title: Attendance tracker
description: Build a customizable employee attendance system with AI and NocoBase: mobile clock-in/out, working hours, lateness and absence, leave and overtime, a monthly attendance matrix and department statistics — a real business system you can keep iterating on, not a one-off prototype.
description_cn: 使用 AI 和 NocoBase 搭建可定制的员工考勤管理系统。将 Claude Code、Codex、Cursor、OpenCode 等 Coding Agent 接入 NocoBase 后，可用自然语言生成移动端打卡、上下班时间、工作时长、迟到缺勤、请假加班、月度考勤表和部门统计，不只是生成原型，而是构建可定制、可靠、可长期迭代的考勤系统。
author: NocoBase Team
prompt: Build a NocoBase app — Attendance Tracker: attendance KPIs, a monthly heatmap, and dual donut charts for status distribution. Match the layout and signature visuals of this reference prototype: https://static-docs.nocobase.com/solution/templates/13-attendance-tracker.html
prompt_cn: 用 NocoBase 搭建一个应用 —— 考勤追踪:考勤 KPI、月度热力图和状态分布双环形图。布局和标志性视觉参照这个原型:https://static-docs.nocobase.com/solution/templates/13-attendance-tracker.html
